name: Norwich Fitness Center
description:
Pickleball at Norwich Fitness Center
Norwich Fitness Center has quickly become a hub for pickleball enthusiasts across the region. With six indoor, climate-controlled courts, it’s the perfect place for players of all levels to enjoy the sport year-round. The facility isn’t just about open play—it’s a space where players come together for organized games, leagues, and special events that foster community, friendly competition, and growth in the game.

Whether you’re looking to improve your skills or just want to jump into a game, teaching pros are available for lessons, and demo paddles are on hand for those trying out new gear. Many players coordinate games through the TeamReach app using code NFCPB2024, which helps keep everyone connected and the action flowing.

From casual drop-ins to serious challengers, Norwich Fitness Center continues to grow as a premier destination for pickleball on the East Coast.
fees: Private — Memberships are just $35 a month, making it one of the most affordable facilities around. For those who prefer to drop in, rates range from $8 to $15, depending on employment status. Discoun

description:
Parking - 
1) Hillcrest Rd - only on the side adjacent to the courts
2) Commuter parking lot on Round Hill Rd between I-95 & School Rd
3) Fairfield Train Station parking lot after 5:00pm weekdays or all day on weekends
4) Football field lot on School Rd (not when school is in session)
5) School Rd near Unquowa Rd (not when school is in session)

Do not park in front of any homes on Hillcrest Rd or on school property when school is in session.

Not available 9:00 am - 12:30 pm during the summer for tennis camp.

Reservations can only be made by residents of Fairfield.

description: Wilbur Cross High School is a place to play pickleball in New Haven, CT. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Wilson-Gray YMCA Youth and Family Center
description: Come play pickleball at Wilson-Gray YMCA Youth and Family Center in Hartford, CT! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Windermere School
description: Windermere School is a place to play pickleball in Ellington, CT. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Windsor Locks
description: Windsor Locks is a place to play pickleball in Windsor Locks, CT. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Wolcott Park
description: Come play pickleball at Wolcott Park in West Hartford, CT! There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Wolfe Park
description: Wolfe Park is a place to play pickleball in Monroe, CT. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The courts can be reserved.
open_play_schedule: Town programming that Parks & Recreation runs have priority use at all times. Exclusion dates are posted on bulletin board at courts. You can not schedule a time from this unauthorized site related to our courts.

name: Woodward Park Pickleball Courts
description: Woodward Park Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Norwalk, CT. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms. You can reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — Open play is FREE for Norwalk residents.

name: Wooster Park
description: Wooster Park is a place to play pickleball in Stratford, CT. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: Yanity Gym
description: Yanity Gym is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ridgefield, CT. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: YMCA of Greenwich
description: YMCA of Greenwich is a place to play pickleball in Greenwich, CT. There are 2 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to lights and restrooms.

name: YWCA of Greenwich
description: YWCA of Greenwich is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Greenwich, CT. There are 6 wood courts. 2 are outdoors and 4 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and trainers or lessons. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play.
open_play_schedule: Daily play from 8:30am-11:30am
